# pm-onethird product roadmap (1/3-2/3 + Union-Closed compatibility-geometry program)

*Generated by pm-onethird on 2026-05-18 09:00 BST (08:00 UTC) — morning sweep. Manual edits will be overwritten on next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail or by editing the PM config.*

**Scope.** Three repos: union_closed, one_third_width_three, one_third. Tags: onethird, one-third, lean, audit, union-closed, frankl.

**Headline state (2026-05-18 morning).** **Cascade of vacuity discoveries overnight; both arcs in strategic-audit pause.**

(1) **Frankl Z-arc STALLED.** Z2 took 10 sub-splits (Z2a-Z2j); Z2j AMBER-MINIMAL after TC-diamond defeated 5 distinct workaround attempts (persistent diamond between HomologicalComplex.instHasZeroMorphisms and preadditiveHasZeroMorphisms on Abelian (HomologicalComplex (HomologicalComplex C c2) (ComplexShape.up Z))). Mayor escalated to Daniel; Daniel chose option (1) strategic-audit + workaround hint (copy from mathlib or reproduce). mg-8510 Z-arc architecture audit (URGENT 600k SENIOR) in flight. Z2k HELD; Z3-Z5 pre-filed tickets effectively shelved pending audit verdict.

(2) **1/3-2/3 ARCHITECTURE FUNDAMENTALLY QUESTIONED.** Four vacuity discoveries in 24h:
- mg-e2e9: pre-cap-5 Case3Witness vacuous (equivalent to headline).
- mg-74d2: layered-form functionally vacuous at headline; F3 doesn't use L; bounded_irreducible_balanced are MARKER theorems.
- mg-5c32: LayeredResidual STATEMENT itself vacuously unprovable for |α|≥11 (cap 1+2+5 contradict; polecat over-constrained by transcribing Case3Witness API as obligation).
- Daniel-flagged: F3 strong-induction CONCLUSION-LIFT mechanism may itself be circular (unaudited by mg-74d2).

A+B split filed per Daniel directive: mg-82fc (proof-outline-audit, URGENT 500k SENIOR; F3 mechanism THE KEY QUESTION) + mg-2970 (residual-re-extraction, 400k SENIOR, depends=mg-82fc). All other width-3 work HELD.

## Trajectory

**Cumulative spend** (rough): ~14M+ tokens last 24h (Frankl Z-arc 10M + OneThird audits 3M + computational verification + ancillary).

**Velocity**: heavy. 4 audits + 11 Z2 sub-tickets + 4 OneThird Daniel-mail-driven analyses landed.

**Bottleneck**: STRATEGIC, not tactical. Both arcs await audit verdicts. Z-arc TC-diamond persistent; OneThird vacuity-cascade fundamentally questions architecture. Daniel and PM are aligned that strategic clarity is needed before more execution spend.

**Quality of work**: substantive. Each AMBER cycle lands real primitives. Every audit surfaces real architectural concerns. mg-4d7b's empirical verification IS real progress on small-poset slice regardless of audit verdicts.

**Risk watchlist**:
- mg-82fc finds F3 circular → entire layered-form architecture exhaustively vacuous → project pivot or abandonment-of-approach.
- mg-8510 finds Z-arc structurally unviable → Frankl Lean formalization paused.
- BOTH audits find vacuity → project-life-level call on whether to continue Frankl + OneThird via current architecture at all.

**Optimistic case**: mg-82fc finds F3 substantive + mg-8510 finds workable Z-arc path. Both arcs revive with corrected residual + non-Z-arc-stalling Lean path. Multi-month execution restart.
